result.stdout:
Usage:
  try-convert [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help                                 Show help and usage information
  -p, --project <project>                        The path to a project to convert [default: ]
  -w, --workspace <workspace>                    The solution or project file to operate on. If a project is not specified, the command will search the current directory for one. [default: ]
  -m, --msbuild-path <msbuild-path>              The path to an MSBuild.exe, if you prefer to use that [default: ]
  -tfm, --target-framework <target-framework>    The name of the framework you would like to upgrade to. If unspecified, the default TFM for apps chosen will be the highest available one found on your machine, and the default TFM for libraries will be .NET Standard 2.0. [default: ]
  --force-web-conversion                         Attempt to convert MVC and WebAPI projects even though significant manual work is necessary after migrating such projects. [default: False]
  --preview                                      Use preview SDKs as part of conversion [default: False]
  --diff-only                                    Produces a diff of the project to convert; no conversion is done [default: False]
  --no-backup                                    Converts projects, does not create a backup of the originals and removes packages.config file. [default: False]
  --keep-current-tfms                            Converts project files but does not change any TFMs. If unspecified, TFMs may change. [default: False]
  --maui-conversion                              Attempt to convert Xamarin.Forms Projects to .NET MAUI projects. There may be additional manual work necessary after migrating such projects. [default: False]
  -u, --update                                   Updates the try-convert tool to the latest available version [default: False]
